technique: Triphasic CT abdomen and pelvis with IV contrast.
findings: Liver: 2.1 cm hypoenhancing lesion in segment VI, washout on portal phase. Spleen: unremarkable. Kidneys: a 1.4 cm complex renal cyst on the right with internal septations. Adrenals: a 3.8 cm right adrenal mass, heterogeneous attenuation. Thyroid: incidentally captured 1.2 cm hypoechoic thyroid nodule with microcalcifications. Lung bases: 8 mm pulmonary nodule, sub-solid, right lower lobe. Bones: lytic lesion in L3 vertebral body, 1.5 cm, well-defined, is a metastasis.
